# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:20.04

# Install necessary packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    python3-pip \
    postgresql \
    redis-server \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set up Nginx
COPY nginx.conf /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
RUN mkdir -p /var/run/redis && chown redis:redis /var/run/redis

# Set up API server
COPY ./api /app/api
WORKDIR /app/api
RUN pip3 install -r requirements.txt

# Expose ports
EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Start services
CMD service postgresql start && \
    service redis-server start && \
    service nginx start && \
    python3 app.py

# Use non-root user for security
RUN useradd -ms /bin/bash appuser
USER appuser

# Ensure the application runs with the non-root user
WORKDIR /app/api
COPY --chown=appuser:appuser ./api /app/api

# Final command to run
CMD ["bash", "-c", "service postgresql start && service redis-server start && service nginx start && python3 app.py"]
